info.name: Lantern
info.summary: Browse server-side git repositories inside Nextcloud
info.description:
Lantern is a read-only browser for git repositories that live on your Nextcloud server's disk. Browse the file tree, read files with syntax highlighting, and view recent commit history — all behind your existing Nextcloud login, with no external forge required.
This is the v1 (local repositories) release. A pluggable provider interface is in place so remote-forge browsing (GitHub/GitLab) can be added later without changing the UI.
Requires the git binary to be installed and runnable by the web-server user. The official Nextcloud Docker image does not include git; Lantern's setup check will warn you if it is missing.
info.author: Paul Ammann
